requirements.title: Mutex Root Structure
requirements.description: The mutex root shall embed a module root with an API vtable pointer.
requirements.rationale: Provides a portable abstraction interface for platform-specific capabilities.

requirements.title: TryLock Operation
requirements.description: The mutex API vtable shall define a TryLock operation that attempts to acquire the lock and returns immediately with a boolean result.
requirements.rationale: Provides a portable abstraction interface for platform-specific capabilities.

requirements.title: Lock Operation
requirements.description: The mutex API vtable shall define a Lock operation that blocks until the lock is acquired.
requirements.rationale: Provides a portable abstraction interface for platform-specific capabilities.

requirements.title: Free Operation
requirements.description: The mutex API vtable shall define a Free operation that releases the lock.
requirements.rationale: Provides a portable abstraction interface for platform-specific capabilities.

requirements.title: Mutex Vtable Validation
requirements.description: The mutex module shall verify that its API vtable and all function pointers within it are non-NULL.
requirements.rationale: Provides a portable abstraction interface for platform-specific capabilities.
